## Meeting Purpose

[Deep-dive session between Swoogo and GrowthX Labs to discuss Swoogo's product, value propositions, competitors, and content marketing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Swoogo offers an end-to-end event management solution with strengths in personalized registration experiences, data insights, integration capabilities, predictable pricing, and responsive support](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Key value drivers are control/flexibility, personalized attendee experiences, data insights, data portability/integrations, predictable pricing, and trusted partner support](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [Top competitors are Cvent/Regfocus (Tier 1), Bizzabo/Hopin (Tier 2), Splash/Eventbrite (Tier 3)](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=2129.0)
  - [GrowthX will create content aligned with Swoogo's value props, focusing on event ROI measurement, CRM/martech integrations](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=2722.0)

## Topics

### Product Overview

  - [End-to-end solution: websites, registration, communications, session management, mobile apps](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Excels at Tier 2 (complex conferences) and Tier 3 (webinars, repeatable events)](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Differentiators: personalized registration logic, data mapping to CRM, flexible reporting](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Value Propositions

  - [Control/flexibility with drag-and-drop setup and brand customization](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Personalized attendee experiences via visibility logic throughout](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Access to data insights and custom reporting within platform](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Data portability with native CRM/martech integrations and open API](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Predictable user-based pricing vs. per registration](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
  - [Responsive in-house support team](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=2031.0)

### Competitors

  - [Tier 1 (large events): Cvent, Regfocus, Bizzabo, Hopin](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=2129.0)
  - [Tier 2 (conferences): Bizzabo, Hopin, Cvent, Regfocus](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=2188.0)
  - [Tier 3 (webinars): Splash, Eventbrite, Bizzabo](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=2223.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focus on event ROI, CRM/martech integrations based on market demand](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=2722.0)
  - [3 articles this week, 5 next week, then 10/week](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=2714.0)
  - [Leverage value props and differentiation in calls-to-action](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=2600.0)
  - [Provide competitor comparison content, value messaging](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=2600.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Swoogo to provide value messaging doc, competitor comparison, sample outbound emails](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=2831.0)
  - [GrowthX to get Google Search Console access to track traffic metrics](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=3109.0)
  - [Swoogo to share product video/demo of new UI (available 8/28)](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=2895.0)
  - [Discuss imagery/stock photo needs for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/BJzsTUQsGC1PscP5Dj-4WmzGzLVF-Wmf?tab=summary&timestamp=3019.0)
